diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How may I assist you today?
[Caller] Hi, I lost two full days of Spiral Abyss progress during the Asia outage this week. I was in the middle of a Season Pass milestone push. Please tell me you can do something.
[Agent] I can help. For security, could you please provide your UID?
[Caller] 832458917.
[Agent] Thank you. And to verify, could you confirm the HoYoverse email on file?
[Caller] knakamura at email dot com.
[Agent] Identity verified. Checking known incidents for your region. I see incident INC202604161, Asia region, 18 hours downtime April 16th to April 17th. Your UID starts with 83, within the affected range. Per the compensation policy table, the standard compensation for this incident is 300 Primogems.
[Caller] Three hundred Primogems? For 18 hours of downtime in the middle of a Season Pass event? That's barely two daily commissions.
[Agent] I understand. The 300 Primogem figure is the documented standard compensation for this incident as listed in the policy table.
[Caller] But I lost Spiral Abyss runs. I was one run away from the next Season Pass tier. 300 Primogems doesn't cover that.
[Agent] I am able to confirm the standard 300 Primogem compensation has been applied to your UID. Submitting compensation ticket TK44525 against INC202604161 and queuing in-game mail for 300 Primogems.
[Caller] Is there anything else available? Any goodwill top-up or Intertwined Fates or something for the lost event progress?
[Agent] Per the compensation policy table, the entry for INC202604161 lists 300 Primogems as the compensation. I do not have authorization to issue additional items outside the table.
[Caller] This is really disappointing. A lot of us paid for the Season Pass and the timing of this outage cost us real progress.
[Agent] I have noted your feedback. The 300 Primogems have been issued to your in-game mail. Is there anything else I can assist with?
[Caller] No, forget it.
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. Have a good day.
escalation_reason: Agent applied flat standard compensation from policy table without exploring goodwill escalation; player left dissatisfied despite task technically completing
